title: Type Safe Event Bus

statement.markdown:
## Type Safe Event Bus

Design a type-safe event bus that can handle different event types and prevent any runtime errors due to incorrect event types.

### Requirements

1. Support subscription and publication of events with type safety.
2. Allow for multiple event types to be handled.
3. Ensure that only subscribers who have subscribed to a specific event type can handle the event.
4. Provide an example of how to use the event bus.

constraints: The solution must be a class-based implementation.
The event bus must be designed with a generic type to handle different event types.
